# Welcome!

My blog is dedicated to my passion for web development. Here you will find an overview of my skills, my projects and my professional background. This page is not just a showcase of my work — it is also an interactive online CV.

## About me

I arrived in France in August 2018. Having been a manager in my previous job, I am responsible, attentive and sociable. I am motivated to find a new job and I have a good command of foreign languages. I am passionate about the world of web development and have built up expertise in creating innovative, functional websites. My professional background reflects my commitment to excellence and creativity.



## Higher education

### Ural Mining University, Russia (2009 – 2014)
- **Specialist degree. Faculty of Technology. Mining Engineer**
- French equivalence: Attestation de Comparabilité (BAC+5)
  - File reference: 656958
  - Received in 2021

## My skills

- Language skills
- Project management and planning
- Teamwork
- Autonomy and initiative
- Adaptability


## My projects

Explore my previous projects, which showcase my varied skills and my creative approach to web development. Each project is an opportunity for me to push my limits and deliver innovative solutions.

## Online CV

My website also serves as an online CV, presenting my professional background, technical skills and achievements. Check out my portfolio to learn more about my past and current projects.



## Contact

Feel free to contact me to discuss your project ideas or to learn more about my skills. I am always open to new opportunities and collaborations.

Thank you for visiting my site — I hope you enjoy exploring my work and learning more about my journey in web development.

See you soon!
